heading: Art. 91. Insubordinate conduct toward warrant officer, noncommissioned officer, or petty officer
label: 891 Art. 91. Insubordinate conduct toward warrant officer, noncommissioned officer, or petty officer
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)89150:685.(Art. 91), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 136The word “member” is substituted for the word “person”.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)89150:685.(Art. 91), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 136The word “member” is substituted for the word “person”.

children.text: strikes or assaults a warrant officer, noncommissioned officer, or petty officer, while that officer is in the execution of his office;
willfully disobeys the lawful order of a warrant officer, noncommissioned officer, or petty officer; or
treats with contempt or is disrespectful in language or deportment toward a warrant officer, noncommissioned officer, or petty officer, while that officer is in the execution of his office;
